headlines.title: Grief-stricken widow was living at husband's grave, until helped arrived
headlines.summary: When a 55-year-old woman lost her job and got evicted, she took up residence at the only place she felt she owned, her husband's grave. Then, an "angel" came to her rescue. Steve Hartman has the story...

headlines.title: Man who allegedly threatened to shoot ICE agents had rifles, body armor and ammo cache, feds say
headlines.summary: An Ohio man who allegedly threatened ICE agents on social media is facing federal charges after authorities found guns and tactical gear at his home....

headlines.title: 1/23: CBS Evening News
headlines.summary: Biggest snowstorm in years set to hit half of U.S.; Grief-stricken widow was living at husband's grave, until help arrived...

headlines.title: NTSB investigating Waymo robotaxis for improperly passing school buses
headlines.summary: The National Transportation Safety Board announced it has opened an investigation into Waymo robotaxis following a series of incidents in Austin involving school buses filled with children....
